description: This service is an unofficial REST API about the Fortnite game, exposing endpoints for news, player stats, PvE information, store data, and status checks. Its published API spec points to a Heroku-hosted backend and an archived GitHub repository containing the source and Swagger definition.
summary: One HTTP REST API is documented for this domain: the FORTNITE REST API at `https://skynewz-api-fortnite.herokuapp.com/api`, with Swagger/OpenAPI available and bearer-token authentication obtained from an email/password token endpoint.
